title: Canned Fruit Cocktail
description: Classic canned fruit cocktail served chilled with a dollop of yogurt or whipped cream. Easy, refreshing, and nostalgic.

ingredients.item: fruit cocktail in juice or light syrup

steps.instruction: Open can and drain approximately half the syrup or juice. Retain some liquid to keep fruit moist.
Pour fruit into a bowl and check each piece for size and firmness — cut down any pieces that are too large.
Check pineapple pieces — if too firm, heat briefly with a small amount of juice in the microwave for 30–45 seconds to soften.
Stir in yogurt or whipped cream if desired for extra creaminess.
Serve chilled or at room temperature.

notes: Canned fruit in juice (not syrup) keeps it lighter and less sweet. Great served over cottage cheese or with a scoop of ice cream.
